channel.title: Randhawa Blog
channel.description: Personal blog featuring thoughts on technology, design, and life.

item.title: Buy My Mixtape Fam
item.description: Just created a little store front for my website. I have been wanting to do this for years, years I tell you. The idea is that people should be able to conne...

item.title: Meditation is Narcissism
item.description: One of the many Taleb aphorisms I like and remember. There's a lot of truth to that, I think. Growing up, I subscribed to the unquestioned assumption that In...

item.title: Spam Welcome
item.description: This blog now includes a comments section. But not just any comments section, rather a comment section that may sound silly at first. The idea is to have a c...

item.title: Americano
item.description: I keep realizing the genius of an Americano the older I get. When I moved to America as a teenager, my first job was at a Walmart in Houston. It’s where I fi...

item.title: Jalapeño Ranch Club Sandwich
item.description: Had the new and seasonal Jalapeño Ranch Club sandwich at Chick-fil-A today, it was great.
